urdu transliteration text:
Inkar Asman Ko Hai Razi Zameen Nahin, Asghar Tumare Khoon Ka Thikana Kahin Nahin
Hzt Asghar’s Blood
english translation text:
The sky declined and the earth is unwilling.
Asghar, your blood has no abode

urdu transliteration text:
Zinda Jo Sheh Ki Godh Me Wo Mejabin NahinTariqiyo Me Shor Hai Mere Mubin Nahin
Hzt Asghar’s Blood
english translation text:
The beauty that was in his father’s arms is no more.
There are cries in the darkness, the sun so bright is no more.

urdu transliteration text:
Kehte Hai Is Lahu Ka Bhi Koi Ameen NahinAti Hai Har Taraf Se Sadaye Nahin Nahin
Hzt Asghar’s Blood
english translation text:
They say there is no trustee for his blood.
All that can be heard are the cries of “No, No, No”

urdu transliteration text:
Katre Agar Zameen Pe Gire Misle Ka Ek ShamPhir Hashr Tak Nazar Nahin Ayengi Khetiya
Hzt Asghar’s Blood
english translation text:
If a single drop of his blood was to spill on the earth
The earth would refuse to provide any sustenance until the end of days

urdu transliteration text:
Le Jaye Ghar Hawa Yeh Lahu Suye AsmanBarsenge Ab Aur Na Chamkegi Bijliya
Hzt Asghar’s Blood
english translation text:
And if the wind was to take this blood towards the skies
The clouds would refuse to send rain

urdu transliteration text:
Bachha Tadap Ke Mar Gaya Zakhmee Huwa, Gulub Sunle Kahina Haider Ekrar Ki Bahu
Hzt Asghar’s Blood
english translation text:
The child died like a fish out of water, crying and restless
Hope his mother does not hear this cry

urdu transliteration text:
Layee Ajal Ke Samne Pani Ki Arzoo Ye Kehke Mal Liya Shabir Ne Lahu
Hussain requested water from the face of death
He covered his face with Asghar’s blood
Hzt Asghar’s Blood

Bazmein Maliaka Mein Gazab Ka Hai Shor o ShenDam todta Hai Godh mein Banoo Ka Noor e ayn,
Hzt Asghar’s Blood
english translation text:
In the realm of the Angels, there is woe and wailing
In the arms of his father, the light of his mothers eyes breathes his last

urdu transliteration text:
Dilko Yakin Hai Nehre Se Pani Na PayengeBeta Lahu Se Gusl Tumhe Deke Jayenge
Hzt Asghar’s Blood
english translation text:
For I know, oh son, we are not to get any water
So here, I will give you your final ablution with your blood
